task.description: Fix 4 issues in Fastify/Drizzle/SQLite project to pass a delivery acceptance audit. Run tests after all changes to confirm nothing breaks.

issues.title: Unauthenticated bootstrap-admin endpoint
issues.description: POST /v1/auth/bootstrap-admin had no authentication - anyone could create an admin user when the users table was empty.
issues.fix: Added BOOTSTRAP_SECRET env var to config. Endpoint now requires config.bootstrapSecret to be defined (403 'Bootstrap is disabled' otherwise) and x-bootstrap-secret header to match exactly (403 'Invalid bootstrap secret' otherwise).

issues.title: Auditor over-privileged on reconciliation record reads
issues.description: Auditor role had audit.readReconciliationExports permission which also granted access to raw reconciliation record listing/detail endpoints. Per least-privilege, auditor should only access immutable audit logs and reconciliation exports, not raw records.
issues.fix: Added new permission audit.readReconciliationRecords, granted only to administrator (not auditor). Updated requireReconciliationReadPermission to check the new permission. Export download routes still check audit.readReconciliationExports so auditors can still download exports.

issues.title: Missing DB-level CHECK constraints on business-state text fields
issues.description: Several text columns representing enum states lacked CHECK constraints at the DB level, relying only on app-level validation.
issues.fix: Added CHECK constraints in Drizzle schema for promotions.type, class_instances.publish_state, enrollments.status, charging_sessions.status, orders.status, reconciliation_records.state. Created migration 0006_add_check_constraints.sql using SQLite table-rebuild pattern for the 3 tables that lacked DB-level constraints (promotions, class_instances, enrollments). The other 3 already had CHECK constraints in the initial migration.

issues.title: Missing test coverage for bootstrap-admin and session revoke
issues.description: Auth test file only covered login/me/permissions and 401 for bad credentials.
issues.fix: Added 6 new test cases: bootstrap success on empty DB, blocked without secret header, blocked with wrong secret, blocked when users exist, blocked when disabled (no BOOTSTRAP_SECRET), and session revoke via logout invalidates token. Updated buildTestConfig to accept optional bootstrapSecret parameter.

files_changed.changes: Added BOOTSTRAP_SECRET optional field to config schema and bootstrapSecret to AppConfig type and loadConfig return
Added bootstrap secret validation guards before empty-table check in POST /v1/auth/bootstrap-admin
Added audit.readReconciliationRecords permission, granted to administrator only
requireReconciliationReadPermission now checks audit.readReconciliationRecords instead of audit.readReconciliationExports
Added CHECK constraints for promotions.type, class_instances.publish_state, enrollments.status, charging_sessions.status, orders.status, reconciliation_records.state
New migration using SQLite table-rebuild pattern to add CHECK constraints to promotions, class_instances, and enrollments tables
Documented BOOTSTRAP_SECRET env var in configuration section
Added 6 new test cases for bootstrap-admin auth and session revoke
Updated to expect auditor 403 on reconciliation record list/detail, using admin token instead
buildTestConfig now accepts optional bootstrapSecret parameter
